visa_types.name: Cultural and Sports Events
visa_types.documents_required: Kindly click here to download Document checklist
visa_types.visa_fees:
[isl > tha > en > Table:Cultural and Sports Events > Visa Fees 1]
Methods of payment for visa fees:
- If the applicant submits their visa application at the Iceland Visa Application Centre:
- Card payment at the Iceland Visa Application Centre on the day of appointment
- Cash payment at the Iceland Visa Application Centre on the day of appointment
- QR code payment at the Iceland Visa Application Centre on the day of appointment
Service charge applicable when applying at the Iceland Visa Application Centre:
Service charge:

[isl > tha > en > Service Fee]
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fees and VFS service fee in THB depend on the current exchange rate, which can be changed without any notifications
- Applicants who are exempted from the visa fees need to pay only the service fee
- The service fee is inclusive of VAT and is non-refundable.
- Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost. Please see more detail from Additional Services tab.
visa_types.processing_time:
Decisions about Schengen visa applications must normally be made within 15 days. In some cases applications will require further enquiry. In these cases, the maximum processing time is 30 days. In exceptionally difficult cases the processing time can be up to 60 days.
Application processing time counts from the time an admissible application is submitted at a diplomatic mission or a Visa Application Centre. 'Admissible' means that the mission has decided that the Schengen conditions for submitting an application have been met
visa_types.forms:
Iceland Visa Application Form - English (Form to be filled by Latin Letters in English)
Iceland Visa Application Form - Icelandic (Form to be filled by Latin Letters in English)
For UTL Form please click on https://visa.government.is/ (https://visa.government.is/).
Kindly download the visa application form for Iceland. Fill in the details and submit it at the Visa Application Centre.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Application is applicable in case you are travelling for a cultural and/or sports event. This visa is given for a travel period of less than 90 days.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Application is applicable in case you are travelling for a cultural and/or sports event. This visa is given for a travel period of less than 90 days.

## Visa Fees

[isl > tha > en > Table:Cultural and Sports Events > Visa Fees 1]
Methods of payment for visa fees:
- If the applicant submits their visa application at the Iceland Visa Application Centre:
- Card payment at the Iceland Visa Application Centre on the day of appointment
- Cash payment at the Iceland Visa Application Centre on the day of appointment
- QR code payment at the Iceland Visa Application Centre on the day of appointment
Service charge applicable when applying at the Iceland Visa Application Centre:
Service charge:

[isl > tha > en > Service Fee]
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fees and VFS service fee in THB depend on the current exchange rate, which can be changed without any notifications
- Applicants who are exempted from the visa fees need to pay only the service fee
- The service fee is inclusive of VAT and is non-refundable.
- Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost. Please see more detail from Additional Services tab.

## Documents Required
Kindly click here to download Document checklist

## Photo Specifications

[isl > phl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 1]

[isl > phl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 2]

[isl > phl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 3]

[isl > phl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 4]

## Processing Time
Decisions about Schengen visa applications must normally be made within 15 days. In some cases applications will require further enquiry. In these cases, the maximum processing time is 30 days. In exceptionally difficult cases the processing time can be up to 60 days.
Application processing time counts from the time an admissible application is submitted at a diplomatic mission or a Visa Application Centre. 'Admissible' means that the mission has decided that the Schengen conditions for submitting an application have been met

## Download Forms
Iceland Visa Application Form - English (Form to be filled by Latin Letters in English)
Iceland Visa Application Form - Icelandic (Form to be filled by Latin Letters in English)
For UTL Form please click on https://visa.government.is/ (https://visa.government.is/).
Kindly download the visa application form for Iceland. Fill in the details and submit it at the Visa Application Centre.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Application is applicable in case you are travelling for tourism.
A visa normally grants you the right to stay in the entire Schengen region.
A visa allows you to stay a maximum of 90 days in any 180-day period in Iceland and is normally valid for the entire Schengen region.
Decisions about visa applications must normally be made within 15 working days from the day Embassy receives it, excluding submission time at VFS). In some cases applications will require further enquiry or documentation. So processing time in these cases might prolong. Applicants might also be asked to appear for an Interview at the Embassy.
A visa does not allow you to work in Iceland unless the Immigration Service has explicitly granted you this right.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Application is applicable in case you are travelling for tourism.
A visa normally grants you the right to stay in the entire Schengen region.
A visa allows you to stay a maximum of 90 days in any 180-day period in Iceland and is normally valid for the entire Schengen region.
Decisions about visa applications must normally be made within 15 working days from the day Embassy receives it, excluding submission time at VFS). In some cases applications will require further enquiry or documentation. So processing time in these cases might prolong. Applicants might also be asked to appear for an Interview at the Embassy.
A visa does not allow you to work in Iceland unless the Immigration Service has explicitly granted you this right.

## Visa Fees

[isl > tha > en > Table:Tourist Visit > Visa Fees 1]
Methods of payment for visa fees:
- If the applicant submits their visa application at the Iceland Visa Application Centre:
- Card payment at the Iceland Visa Application Centre on the day of appointment

- QR code payment at the Iceland Visa Application Centre on the day of appointment

[isl > tha > en > Service Fee]
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fees and VFS service fee in THB depend on the current exchange rate, which can be changed without any notifications
- Applicants who are exempted from the visa fees need to pay only the service fee
- The service fee is inclusive of VAT and is non-refundable.
- Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost. Please see more detail from Additional Services tab.

## Documents Required

Application processing time counts from the time an admissible application is submitted at a diplomatic mission or a Visa Application Centre. 'Admissible' means that the mission has decided that the Schengen conditions for submitting an application have been met

visa_types.name: Long Term(D Visa)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Applicants who wish to apply for Resident Permits or D Visa for Iceland mission will apply for their application with the Directorate of immigration department (contact Email: utl@utl.is (mailto:utl@utl.is) ). Once the application is accepted by the Directorate of immigration department, the Directorate of Immigration will request the applicant to visit the nearest visa application centre to submit their application.
Visa application centre in Thailand will connect with applicants and guide them to the next steps of submitting their Passport for visa issuance and capture biometrics and live photo.
LIST OF COUNTRIES.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Applicants who wish to apply for Resident Permits or D Visa for Iceland mission will apply for their application with the Directorate of immigration department (contact Email: utl@utl.is (mailto:utl@utl.is) ). Once the application is accepted by the Directorate of immigration department, the Directorate of Immigration will request the applicant to visit the nearest visa application centre to submit their application.
Visa application centre in Thailand will connect with applicants and guide them to the next steps of submitting their Passport for visa issuance and capture biometrics and live photo.
LIST OF COUNTRIES.
